pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business

case1.challenge: Low lead conversion from Instagram Direct — 15% of leads were lost due to slow manager responses. Average response time 2-4 hours.
case1.solution: Deployed AI manager for Instagram, integrated with AmoCRM, trained on 500 typical dialogs, set up auto-escalation for complex queries.

case2.challenge: Support team of 5 couldn't handle request volume. Average response time — 6 hours. 30% lead loss.
case2.solution: Deployed AI manager for Telegram and WhatsApp, integrated with HubSpot CRM, automated lead qualification and FAQ.

items.question: How much does AI manager implementation cost?
items.answer: From $1,500/month for the basic plan to custom Enterprise solutions. Cost depends on message volume, number of messengers, and customization level.

items.question: What are the implementation timelines?
items.answer: From 2 weeks for basic setup to 6-8 weeks for full customization with CRM integrations and training on your data.

items.question: Does our team need technical expertise?
items.answer: No, we handle all technical tasks. Your team only provides data, FAQ, and feedback for model training.

items.question: Which messengers are supported?
items.answer: Telegram, WhatsApp Business, Instagram Direct. We can add other platforms on request: Facebook Messenger, Viber, and others.

items.question: How is data security ensured?
items.answer: All data is encrypted with AES-256, stored on secure servers. GDPR, SOC 2 compliance available. On-premise deployment possible.

items.question: Can we change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. When upgrading — proportional recalculation.

items.question: What support is provided?
items.answer: Email support on all plans, 24/7 chat on Advanced and Enterprise, dedicated account manager on Enterprise.

items.question: Is there a trial period?
items.answer: Yes, 14 days free on the Advanced plan for testing. No credit card required, full functionality.
